title: invitations — tenancy hooks
description: Per-tenant lifecycle callbacks (#[AsTenancyHook]) this module contributes. Currently none — invitations do not need to set request-scoped state beyond what the tenancy substrate already provides (log context + cache prefix). This file exists for uniform module shape; add hooks here if a future feature needs per-tenant warming (e.g. a preloaded rate-limit budget per tenant).
notes: The `throttle.invitations` middleware reads rate-limit budgets from `settings.json` per tenant. If we later find those reads are hot, we can add a warming hook here to preload the tenant's budgets into the cache on tenant init.
